summary: Comprehensive testing of BlackieFi 6 new features. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All 6 new frontend pages render correctly with proper UI components. PDF downloads working. PWA service worker registered.
seed_data_creation: Demo user with full financial data already seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new BlackieFi features tested and working. Backend: Portfolio Analytics (summary, history, allocation, monthly-performance), Audit Log (list with filters, actions, resource-types), Recurring Transactions (status, settings, process), Multi-tenancy (cross-entity-summary, entity-comparison, switch-entity), PDF Export (dashboard, transactions, portfolio). Frontend: All 6 new pages working with proper data-testid attributes. PWA manifest.json and service worker accessible.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/portfolio-analytics/summary - 200 with net_worth, total_cash, total_investments, investment_gain
GET /api/portfolio-analytics/history - 200 with monthly history for line chart
GET /api/portfolio-analytics/allocation - 200 with asset allocation for pie chart
GET /api/portfolio-analytics/monthly-performance - 200 with income vs expenses for bar chart
feature_1_portfolio_analytics.frontend_page: PortfolioAnalyticsPage.jsx - Shows line chart, pie chart, bar chart, summary cards

feature_2_audit_log.frontend_page: AuditLogPage.jsx - Shows filters (action, resource type, date range) and paginated table

backend_endpoints: GET /api/recurring/status - 200 with due_income, due_expenses, due_debts, total_due
feature_3_recurring_transactions.frontend_page: RecurringPage.jsx - Shows status card, due items sections, settings with auto-process toggle

backend_endpoints: GET /api/multitenancy/cross-entity-summary - 200 with entities array, total_net_worth, entity_count
GET /api/multitenancy/entity-comparison - 200 with monthly comparisons across entities
feature_4_multitenancy.frontend_page: CrossEntityPage.jsx - Shows combined net worth, entity cards with switch buttons, comparison chart

backend_endpoints: GET /api/pdf/dashboard - 200 returns PDF with charts (reportlab + matplotlib)
GET /api/pdf/transactions - 200 returns PDF with transaction list
GET /api/pdf/portfolio - 200 returns PDF with portfolio charts
feature_5_pdf_export.frontend_page: PDFExportPage.jsx - Shows 3 download buttons, date range for transactions

feature_6_pwa.manifest: GET /manifest.json - 200 with name, short_name, icons, display: standalone
feature_6_pwa.service_worker: GET /sw.js - 200 with cache handling, offline support
feature_6_pwa.registration: Service worker registered on page load (confirmed in console)
